# Templates

Ready-to-use templates for common research tasks.
Copy the relevant template and adapt it to your needs.

## Available Templates

| Template | Description |
|---|---|
| [Journal Club](journal-club.md) | Slide structure and discussion prompts for presenting a paper |
| [Paper Outline](paper-outline.md) | Section-by-section scaffold for a physics paper |

## LaTeX Templates

The `resources/paper-template/` folder in the repository contains a minimal LaTeX template
for a two-column physics paper, including a `main.tex` and a `references.bib` file.
